name: Mizuno Corporation
summary: Mizuno Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells sporting goods in Japan and internationally. The company offers products for golf clubs; baseball gloves; running shoes; shoes for football and rugby players, as well as for trekking; volleyball uniforms and shoes; table tennis wear and shoes; handball shoes; skating suits; footwear and apparel for curling; and uniforms for ski jumping, as well as goods for judo. It also manages sports facilities. The company was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
